stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes the Instrument Landing System (ILS) localiser radiation pattern?

options.a: Two overlapping lobes on the same UHF carrier frequency
options.b: A pencil beam comprising a series of smaller beams each carrying a different modulation
options.c: Two overlapping lobes on different radio carrier frequencies but with the same modulation
options.d: Two overlapping lobes on the same VHF carrier frequency
